system.description:
Creating and appraising magical artifacts.
  • Identifying most common potions: Artifice/EDU 8+
  • Identifying a rare magic item: Artifice/EDU 10+ or higher
  • Creating a simple magic item based on an Arcane spell: Artifice/INT 10+
  • Creating a complex magic item not based on a spell: Artifice/INT 12+
system.shortdescr: Creating, appraising, and identifying magical artifacts.
